offer: For property managers processing 5–15 utility invoices/month, manual compilation causes reporting delays. We automate the report generation instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem: Manual compilation of utility expenses leads to errors and delays in reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for property managers
try_it: Let users try report generation on 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing invoices
Streamline onboarding process for new users
